title: Unit 1 – G2: Question tags (Bestätigungsfragen)
description: Ergänze die passende Bestätigungsfrage am Ende des Satzes

items.question: You're feeling nervous, ___ you?
Emily isn't going to watch a movie, ___ she?
Emily and Madison can be friends, ___ they?
Madison is a nice girl, ___ she?
They are watching the race, ___ they?
She can swim very well, ___ she?
He isn't at home, ___ he?
I'm in your team, ___ I?
Aunt Amy knows a lot about horses, ___ she?
We talked about this last week, ___ we?
We often have a little party after the race, ___ we?
Ryan and Mike had a lot of fun, ___ they?
We've got a good horse, ___ we?
Mr. Gibson played an interesting song in class, ___ he?
Its title was 'I want it all', ___ it?
We're going to work on our project, ___ we?
You already have some ideas, ___ you?
Positiver Hauptsatz → Bestätigungsfrage ist ...
Negativer Hauptsatz → Bestätigungsfrage ist ...
Hauptsatz mit 'can' → Bestätigungsfrage mit ...
Hauptsatz im simple present → Bestätigungsfrage mit ...
Hauptsatz im simple past → Bestätigungsfrage mit ...
